creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

Games that need a lot of resources / performance, are often provided with a very poor performance when opening or after loading into the game.

When the bug occurs the performance is divided again in 2 to 3 levels 

- Good performance but you still feel that something is not running well. (30-40 FPS)
- Average performance. (25-30 FPS)
- Very poor performance. 0-5 or 10 FPS)

It helps if you start the game several times until you don't have the bug and the game runs as smooth as it should and then you might also able to hear the GPU working like fans etc..

But this bug can also occur during a game session (depending on how the games are designed) when other e.g. levels, worlds or similar are loaded. (Example, you start smooth into level 1 but level 2 is not smooth reloading level 2 could help again).

Unfortunately I can't say exactly when this started, because the problem could have been around for a very long time and could have been went unnoticed.

Tested on FreeBSD 13 REL and STA and 14 (main-n261233)

GPU: AMD Radeon RX 570 in the past and now using RX 6700 XT

CPU: Intel i5-10600K
